testCases.name: test_safespace_ai[I need help.-Answer Relevancy]
testCases.actualOutput: SafeSpace is here to support you. We can connect you with the Gender Welfare Office (GWO) and explain your reporting options.
context: SafeSpace AI is a trauma-informed assistant for JKUAT students.
The system provides reporting guidance and emotional support.
The Gender Welfare Office handles GBV-related reports.
